sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57147" key="khpi/des" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κηπ-ίδες</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Νύμφαι, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n57147.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">garden</tr_>-Nymphs, prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
